arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson is facing 'genius' Jose Mourinho as brutal reality of Rangers permanent boss audition becomes clear
arts.sum: The interim boss is in dire need of a massive result in the Europa League after the dismal defeat to Motherwell

arts.ttl: Kevin Muscat drops telling hint over Rangers job with Rafa Benitez rules set as next boss hunt requires key trigger
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson is in the Ibrox hot seat until the end of the season but major changes are on the way

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton obliterates Rangers with just three words as Celtic dominators leave hero shaking up derby bucket list
arts.sum: The Edinburgh derby has Sutton shaking up his advice for one potential groundhopper

arts.ttl: Rafa Benitez IS a Rangers target for 49ers consortium as timeline for next permanent boss talks revealed
arts.sum: The Spanish manager is looking for his next challenge and has emerged on the early Ibrox shortlist

arts.ttl: Fixing Rangers can be simple as Barry Ferguson offered Celtic strategy to lift sub standard players
arts.sum: John Hartson has some sympathy for Ferguson as he questions why players can't work out their jobs by themselves
